title: stipa pennata subsp. puberula
intro: Stipa pennata subsp. puberula, also known as the pubescent feather grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stipa pennata subsp. puberula include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
